creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
First,

=> drood-4.6.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.mammothcheese.ca/drood-4.6.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.mammothcheese.ca/drood-4.6.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 52952, actual 52989
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/drood-4.6.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/drood-4.6.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.

Second, you probably need USE_OPENSSL_PORT=yes instead of *DEPENDS
